title: Authentication
description:
An Authentication contains various fields, often credentials such as API tokens, used to access Partner APIs on
behalf of a user. The actual fields are held securely by Zapier

type.description:
The type of this object.

* `authentication` - authentication

id.description: The identifier for this specific Authentication

app.description: An app that integrates with Zapier.

is_expired.description: If `true`, this Authentication has expired. It will not be usable, and the user needs to be directed to reconnect it.

title.description: The title of this specific Authentication
